svg.title: SanData System Architecture v2
svg.desc: Updated full-stack architecture for SanData including security middleware, environment variables, and safe data handling rules.
svg.text: Security middleware (every request passes through this)
Environment variables (.env.local + Vercel dashboard — never in code)
Data layer (MongoDB Atlas — parameterized queries only)

g.text: Server awards XP → badge check → leaderboard update

svg.text: Codex rule: XP is never read from req.body — server calculates it. All secrets via process.env.* only.
Never trust client-sent values for scores, levels, or badge status.
